abort_criteria: Abort if a canonical URL falls outside the public allowlist.
Abort if a candidate references authenticated or private DevHub account scope.
Abort if raw body, download, or archive references are present.
Abort if a live crawl or processor execution claim is present.
Abort if a legal or permitting outcome guarantee is present.
Abort if active registry or schedule mutation is requested.

source_adjustments.adjustment_reason: High-change DevHub guidance page should remain in the daily manual review candidate set.
